title: See Through Lava And Water.
description: You can see through lava and water with this pack.
body:
![Really](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae4ee2551b3201dffc35aa19be88caef2218db1.png)
![View in lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b183dcf55c3bf7cda57fd198993825f47715bc.png)Useing this resource pack allows you to see through lava and water clearly.
It's good for mining ores under lava in the nether. Specially to find ancient debri in the nether.
